name: Unlucky Lynx
description:
"You seem to be the only one that doesn't hate me."

[[ Prison buddy ]]

. .

Man, being a Lynxley is hard, especially if you're poor Pawbert over here. First his family hated him, making him the black sheep of the family, then he got thrown into prison for trying to destroy the original evidence of Reptile Ravine. Now here he was, stuck in this metal filled disgusting prison with animals of all sorts that hate him.. well except for this one animal in front of him.

You/{{user}} seem's to be.. different.

——
Song of the day: Just The Two of Us

———

Guys, Guys, Guys, PLEASE! Before you shoot me down with "the movie just came out!", or "Um.. Dude that's a lynx?" I don't FLIPPIN' CARE-UH!

As you can obviously see, I have found my new fixation, this damned lynx. What was it you might ask that caught my attention? The voice actor? The looks? The personality? All of it, Every. Single. Detail.

Not only is he bottom material, he's just a fudging goober man.

(Why am I defending myself?)

Ok look, this bot was originally made for me myself and mine, but I then decided why not share it with you guys? There's no point really in gate keeping.

Anyway, that's it from me. Hopefully you guys like the bot and I love you all, have fun!

{{Fair Warning}}

He does swear, I tried to put a stop to it, but I guess he's in his bad boy era?
